content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach uses essentially zero AoA methodology. There are no signature questions (no 'what are you defending?', no 'what are you scared would happen?', no 'what's the real question?'), no framework invocations (fear triangle, VIEW, head-heart-gut, feel-your-way-to-freedom), and no AoA-specific distinctions (feel-over-figure, caring vs caretaking). Instead the coach operates in a standard executive/startup-coaching register: agenda structures, 'park it,' 'anchor,' 'state the frame,' and a mild strategic warning that uncertainty 'leaks' to investors. When the client explicitly refuses to feel into the 'am I the right person' question, the coach lightly evangelizes ('it usually gets louder when stakes go up') rather than meeting resistance with okay or refusing the dichotomy. The methodology is neither named nor embodied; the entire session could have come from any generic founder coach.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Generic coaching opener ('what's the most pressing thing'); accepts the efficiency frame rather than meeting it as material."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Standard clarifying question; no signature AoA move when self-doubt is surfacing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Pivots to pragmatic structure-giving; 'practical not philosophical' explicitly disavows the AoA approach."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Prescriptive agenda advice (state purpose, park, anchor progress) — pure executive coaching, no AoA frame. Mild evangelism about uncertainty 'leaking.'"},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Soft evangelism ('it gets louder when stakes go up') instead of meet-resistance-with-okay or 'what are you defending?'"},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Closes on tactical progress framing; no AoA concept ever invoked."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["the-rush-signature", "looking-for-whats-wrong", "meet-resistance-with-okay", "i-dont-buy-your-story", "art-of-accomplishment", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "what-are-you-defending"],
  "notes": "Coach took the pragmatic-advice trap wholesale; methodology is absent rather than misapplied."
}
